text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You see, I'm currently on the hunt for 
a new trick to dazzle the audience with.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oho? Then allow me to be of assistance! 
I just happen to have a new serum I've been 
meaning to ——

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, now, Tachyon. What did I say 
about experimenting on others?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I would appreciate your help, though. Your research is very intriguing to me, after all.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmmph… Fine, have it your way. But what is it you want from me, then?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well… I know! Can you make flowers 
sparkle like lights?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want to see those glistening flowers rain 
down from the sky, leaving the audience 
stunned and overjoyed!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
If it's flowers you want, I recently 
acquired some Rafflesia for my 
genetics research.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I could install some lights 
into their centers and drop them 
on the crowd from the rafters.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
U-Ummm… That certainly would be stunning, 
but in a much more… pungent way.
